HEWITT/FAIRBANK
GOVERNMENTAL RELATIONS

Park Executive Building, Suite 1402
925 L Street, Sacramento, California 95814
Telephone (916) 443-0244 Fax (916) 443-2902

June 28, 1990

John Larson, Chair
Fair Political Practices Commission
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, CA 95804

Dear Mr. Larson:

My partner, Cynthia A. Fairbank, and I have operated a
firm specializing in governmental relations in Sacramento
for a number of years.

During this time, we have filed FPPC reports as a
partnership, Hewitt/Fairbank, for two clients for whom we
have contracts in the partnership name. Each of us also
contract with clients individually and report under our own
names those clients with whom we work on an individual
basis.

We have recently been informed by the Technical
Assistance Division of your office that we cannot legally
file in this manner. The statement was made that "a
lobbyist cannot work for more than one lobbying firm." It
is difficult for us to understand the law or the rationale
for this decision.

Would you be kind enough to give us your opinion on
this matter, citing code sections or regulations that
prohibit us from operating three businesses simultaneously?
Proposed is a set of our last filing of FPPC forms--under
Hewitt/Fairbank, Patricia S. Hewitt, and Cynthia A.
Fairbank, respectively.

We are anxious to comply with the law, and would
appreciate your prompt response.

Very truly yours,

PATRICIA S. HEWITT

cc: Gloria Perez, Secretary of State
Colleen McGee, FPPC

FORM 625
1989

(Government Code Section 86400)

REPORT COVERS PERIOD FROM 1/1/90 THROUGH 3/31/90
CUMULATIVE PERIOD BEGINNING 1/1/90

RECEIVED
AND FILED
In the Office of the Secretary of State
of the State of California

APR28 1990
Hand Delivered, Sacramento
MARCH FANG CHI, Secretary of State
FOR OFFICIAL USE ONLY

TYPE OR PRINT IN INK

Executed on April 25, 1990, at Sacramento, CA by Patricia S. Hewitt, owner.

This document is a lobbying firm report form (Form 625) as required by the Government Code Section 86114. It covers the period from January 1, 1990, through March 31, 1990. The cumulative period beginning is also January 1, 1990.

The name of the lobbying firm is Cynthia A. Fairbank. The business address is Suite 1402, 925 L Street, Sacramento, CA 95814, and the telephone number is (916) 443-0244.

PART I indicates that partners, owners, officers, or employees whose "lobbyist reports" (Form 615) are attached to this report. There are no other partners, officers, or employees who engaged in direct communication on at least five separate occasions during the period.

SUMMARY OF PAYMENTS THIS PERIOD:
A. GRAND TOTAL PAYMENTS RECEIVED: $5,000
B. TOTAL ACTIVITY EXPENSES: $0
C. TOTAL PAYMENTS TO OTHER LOBBYING FIRMS: $0
D. GRAND TOTAL PAYMENTS MADE: $0

CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE:
None This Period

IS THE FIRM A MEMBER OF A LOBBYING COALITION?
No

VERIFICATION:
I have used all reasonable diligence in preparing this Report. I have reviewed the Report and to the best of my knowledge the information contained herein and in the attached schedules is true and complete.
I certify under penalty of perjury under the laws of the State of California that the foregoing is true and correct.

Executed on (Date): April 25, 1990
At (City and State): Sacramento, CA
By (Signature of Responsible Officer): Cynthia A. Fairbank
Title: owner
